notes:
Requires .NET 4.5+, but runs perfectly using wine-mono, since .NET is tricky to install.
Download a recent wine-mono MSI from https://dl.winehq.org/wine/wine-mono/
Then use: `WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/511740/pfx wine64 uninstaller` and install the MSI from there. Game works perfectly then.
title: Gal*Gun: Double Peace

notes: Runs perfectly. Eagle eyed players may see a small dip in framerate when many "targets" are onscreen, and there may be a few texture errors that are hard to see, but if you don't care about that, it isn't too immersion breaking anyway, you'll be great!
title: Gal*Gun: Double Peace
